commands.review_summary:
The PR changes session replay sanitization so Anthropic, Amazon Bedrock, and Anthropic Vertex strip invalid thinking blocks even when signature preservation is disabled, with regression tests for signed and unsigned-provider cases.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main gates `stripInvalidThinkingSignatures` on `policy.preserveSignatures`, so an Anthropic-style replay history with an unsigned thinking block can survive sanitization when that policy is false. I did not execute a current-main failing run in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs maintainer scope judgment on replay-only recovery and linked-issue closure; there is no narrow code repair finding for automation.
